Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri

- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
- [Compilation of guide videos](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bnnR--yNl6r5cMljPoEF4bXC9HIoSK_WNUG7ucYGO6A/edit?usp=sharing>) by Kaly
## Mode Specific

## Compendium

+Damage
+list

Hello, these are the list of available commands.

+Pyramid - Origin of time explanation 
+Guides - common guides 
+Codes - codes
+Lore - lore
+Prototype - Prototype Horizon and Timeloop copy explanation
+Echo - echoing wishes banner
+Damage - damage formula
+Saya - Saya banner and event release
+Dtide - Dtide guide
+Char - Character guides
+Catraid - Cat raid
+Pyramid

This item is called **Origin Of Time**, it provides two main benefits:

**Full Refund**: Recovers all XP and materials you invested in the character you use it on.

**Duplicate Conversion**: Only for Standard Awakeners (not for Limited in the Standard pool or the starting SR Awakeners), converts all additional copies into Standard "selectors," which can subsequently be used to obtain or duplicate other Standard Awakeners of your choice (not Limited in Standard).

This process is also applicable to **Standard Wheels** (except the Limited in the Standard pool).

It is primarily obtained from the developers through special in-game mail during specific events, such as anniversaries or major updates. It is used for re-allocating resources to build a better team.
